name: Adisyn Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2150, stop A$0.1485, target A$0.2850 (1.05:1) — then trail it.
